## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:api`)
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] New business logic is in `packages/shared/` (not duplicated in apps)
- [ ] No sensitive data (keys, secrets) is included
- [ ] I agree to the [CLA](../CONTRIBUTING.md#contributor-license-agreement-cla)
